{{Quote|Funny, isn't it, how things wind up. I remember when being in a system this close to the edge of Imperial space meant you slept in your X-wing. Instead, here we are, strolling along like we were on Svivren or Ord Mantell.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
'''Morishim''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Morish]] species.

==History==
===Imperial era===
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Morishim was integrated in the [[Pentastar Alignment]] and later in the [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="TEA" /> The planet was the location of a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] communications center. This center, in a [[Old Recluse's cave|cave]] of the [[High Tatmana]], was left behind after the Empire pulled out to the planet. It was then used by one of the locals and Imperial spy, the [[Old Recluse]], to gain information on galactic affairs and indoctrinate the population.<ref name="SotP" />

===New Republic era===
{{Quote|No one's going to pay many attention to the incident over Morishim.|[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|Tierce]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the planet was liberated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]],<ref name="TEA" /> which later established a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Morishim New Republic starfighter base|base]] there.<ref name="SotP" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Meizh Vermel]] was sent on a [[Mission to Morishim|mission]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] to seek out [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] to ask for [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace negotiations]]. His [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] was [[Mission to Morishim|captured]] by Captain [[Dorja]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] above Morishim before his message could be heard properly.<ref name="SotP" />

===Later history===
In the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Morishim was [[Battle of Morishim|taken]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as the invaders continued their strike towards the planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TEA" />

The world was likely among those liberated by the [[Imperial Remnant]], as it fell within their expanded territory following the defeat of the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="TEA" />

==Other==
The [[wk'ou melon]] grew there.<ref name="SotP" />
